title: Number Crunch
description: Each move slides all number tiles simultaneously in one direction until blocked by a wall, pipe, void, or another tile. When two tiles collide they sum into one (e.g. 3+4→7); each tile merges at most once per move. Pipes deliver one number per turn to their spawn cell (see Multi-cell objects). Portals instantly move any tile on them to the paired portal if the destination is empty. Win by producing merges whose values match the required sequence in order.
